source: Chesterfield County ArcGIS ParcelsEnriched (home counts) + VA DPOR CIC registry (HOA flags)
note: HOA=true means a state-registered HOA was matched to this neighborhood. HOA=false means no confident match (not a guarantee there is no HOA). Home counts are residential parcels, refreshable weekly.
